name: oap-email
description: Scan and search email via IMAP. Use for 'check my email', 'any new messages?', 'emails from Jane', 'email summary since yesterday', 'unread messages'. Returns sanitized plain text — no HTML, no raw MIME. Call 'scan' first to fetch new messages from the mail server, then 'list' or 'summary' to read them.

input.description: JSON with 'action' to select operation. Actions: 'scan' (fetch new from IMAP), 'list' (cached messages), 'get' (single message by id), 'thread' (all messages in thread), 'summary' (activity overview).

since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp — only messages after this time

query.description: Search subject, sender, or body text

output.description: Message objects with sanitized plain text bodies, sender/recipient info, thread IDs, and attachment metadata (no content). Summary returns counts, unique senders, and recent subjects.
